response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, with strong proficiency in C++ and embedded systems (e.g., National Instruments, robotic arms). However, his resume lacks direct experience with embedded networking, security features (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X), or Linux kernel modification, which are critical for this role. His strengths lie in full-stack development and polyglot programming, but the gap in core technical requirements is significant. Native-level Japanese is not indicated.
strengths: Extensive experience with C/C++ and embedded systems development (e.g., National Instruments, robotic arms)
Proven track record in full-stack and polyglot programming (Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang, Java)
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No clear experience with embedded networking or security features (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X) as required for LAN-switch products
No mention of Linux kernel modification or security-related technologies (e.g., encryption, attack detection)
Japanese language proficiency (native-level) is not indicated in the resume
